message.name: DBGCS_COMM_CONTROL
message.description: Control message to operate pump power and resume mission control.
message.field: 1 indicates to power on the pump, 0 to power off the pump
1 indicates to resume mission enable, 0 to resume mission disable

message.name: DBGCS_COMM
message.description: DBGCS communication message carrying flight time, flow meter, remaining payload and pump feedback status.
message.field: Flight time, gets its value from autopilot
Indicates value of the fuel remaining
1 indicates pump is on and spraying, 0 indicates pump is off or faulty

message.name: DBGCS_MOTORCAN
message.description: Motor CAN telemetry message carrying current, voltage, RPM, error flags, and motor temperature.
message.field: States error if any in motor
